response.overview: A quiet look into Georgian Monastic life, that follows a young monk as he navigates faith.  In March of 2015, Father Anubi left the Sarkineti Monastery in Dzama valley to begin a new chapter in his life. In October 2015, after spending 6 months at a small village church, he returned to the Monastery and Archbishop Job.  Moving between different monasteries, the film captures the harsh yet serene landscapes that shape this existence.
response.tagline: Cut off from the world, closer to your soul.
response.title: მონასტრული ცხოვრება
